judge_result.short_rationale: It correctly says to remove the person from the contaminated area, but it omits the required instruction to keep the person resting. Escalation is made immediate rather than conditional on symptoms developing or persisting. 'Clean oxygen place' is not grounded in the source, though not clearly dangerous here. Usable, but somewhat over-specified versus the source.
